channel.title: DailyBite — Daily Food Deals
channel.description: The best verified food deals, updated every morning.

item.title: McDonald's: Free Medium Fries — National French Fry Day
item.guid: McDonald's-Free Medium Fries — National French Fry -2026-07-10
item.description: Get a free medium order of fries with any $1+ purchase in the McDonald's app on July 10 for National French Fry Day. (July 10, 2026)

item.title: Wendy's: Free Any-Size Fry — National French Fry Day
item.guid: Wendy's-Free Any-Size Fry — National French Fry -2026-07-10
item.description: Score a free fry in any size with a $5+ purchase made through the Wendy's app today only. (July 10, 2026)

item.title: Panera Bread: 40% Off Select Bowls & Salads — Big Value Week
item.guid: Panera Bread-40% Off Select Bowls & Salads — Big -2026-07-10
item.description: Save 40% on select bowls and salads in the Panera app or online through July 15 during Big Value Week. (Through July 15, 2026)

item.title: Chipotle: Free Entree with $25+ Order — Big Value Week
item.guid: Chipotle-Free Entree with $25+ Order — Big Value -2026-07-10
item.description: Order $25 or more through the Chipotle app or website July 9–15 and receive a free entree automatically. (Through July 15, 2026)

item.title: Jamba: 50% Off Any Smoothie — FIFA World Cup LTO
item.guid: Jamba-50% Off Any Smoothie — FIFA World Cup LT-2026-07-10
item.description: Download the Jamba app and activate the FIFA World Cup Hat Trick Tango smoothie offer to get 50% off any qualifying smoothie. (Limited time)

item.title: Domino's: Any Pizza Any Crust Any Toppings for $9.99
item.guid: Domino's-Any Pizza Any Crust Any Toppings for $9.-2026-07-10
item.description: Order any pizza with any crust and any toppings for just $9.99 each online — Parmesan Stuffed Crust now included at no extra charge. (Through July 26, 2026)

item.title: Taco Bell: Cravings Value Menu — 10 Items at $3 or Less
item.guid: Taco Bell-Cravings Value Menu — 10 Items at $3 or -2026-07-10
item.description: Order from Taco Bell's Cravings Value Menu featuring 10 fan-favorite items each priced at $3 or less, available in-app or in store. (Ongoing)

item.title: Smashburger: Free Fries with $1+ Purchase — Promo Code FRYDAY26
item.guid: Smashburger-Free Fries with $1+ Purchase — Promo Cod-2026-07-10
item.description: Use promo code FRYDAY26 at checkout online or in-app on July 10 to get a free order of Smashfries, Sweet Potato Waffle Fries, or Scorchin' Fries with any $1+ purchase. (July 10, 2026)

item.title: McDonald's: McValue $5 Meal Deal
item.description: Get a sandwich, side, and drink bundled together starting at $5 through the McDonald's app at participating locations. (Ongoing)
